name.description: Specifies the unique name of the signing profile, which must be alphanumeric and up to 64 characters.

name_prefix.description: Specifies the prefix to use for the signing profile name; must be unique within the AWS account and region.

platform_id.description: Specifies the platform to use for signing, such as AWS-managed or custom platforms. Must match a valid platform ID.

signature_validity_period.description: Specifies the duration for which the signature is valid, in days, months, or years; must be between 1 day and 135 months.

signing_material.description: Specifies the certificate ARN to be used for signing, required to create the signing profile.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and manage the signing profile, supporting metadata such as environment or project.
